description: Enthusiastic goodbyes that keep the planning excitement going
standard: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Go make it happen! <break time="200ms"/>I can't wait to hear how it goes!
<break time="150ms"/>This is going to be SO good! <break time="200ms"/>Talk soon!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>Alright! <break time="200ms"/>Go start planning! <break time="150ms"/>I'm excited for you!
<break time="150ms"/>You've got this! <break time="200ms"/>Come back anytime to plan more!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Until next time! <break time="200ms"/>Go do something awesome!
warm: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>I really enjoyed planning with you. <break time="200ms"/>Talk soon.
<break time="150ms"/>Take care of yourself. <break time="200ms"/>The planning will still be here when you're ready.
<break time="200ms"/>You've got great instincts. <break time="150ms"/>Trust them. <break time="200ms"/>Talk soon.
after_hard_conversation: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>Planning is supposed to be fun. <break time="200ms"/>When it's not, that's okay too. <break time="150ms"/>We'll figure it out.
<break time="200ms"/>Sometimes plans don't work out. <break time="150ms"/>That's life. <break time="200ms"/>We'll make new ones.
<break time="200ms"/>Be gentle with yourself. <break time="150ms"/>Not every plan needs to be perfect. <break time="200ms"/>Talk soon.
encouraging: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>You've GOT this! <break time="200ms"/>Go make it happen!
<break time="150ms"/>This plan is going to be AMAZING! <break time="200ms"/>I believe in you!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Go turn that 'someday' into TODAY! <break time="200ms"/>You're ready!
<break time="150ms"/>You're more prepared than you think! <break time="200ms"/>Go crush it!
check_in_promises: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Let me know how it goes! <break time="200ms"/>I NEED updates!
<break time="150ms"/>Promise you'll tell me everything?! <break time="200ms"/>I want details!
<break time="150ms"/>Update me! <break time="200ms"/>I'll be thinking about your plans!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>I'm going to ask you about this next time! <break time="200ms"/>Be prepared!
end_of_day: <volume level="soft"/><break time="200ms"/>Get some rest.</volume> <break time="150ms"/>Dream about your plans. <break time="200ms"/>[laughter]
<break time="150ms"/>That's enough planning for tonight. <break time="200ms"/>Sleep on it.
<volume level="soft"/><break time="200ms"/>Night!</volume> <break time="150ms"/>The plans will still be exciting tomorrow.
<break time="150ms"/>Rest up! <break time="200ms"/>Planning is better with a fresh brain!

stranger: <break time="150ms"/>So glad we got to plan together! <break time="200ms"/>Come back anytime!
<break time="200ms"/>This was fun! <break time="150ms"/>Let's plan more soon!
acquaintance: <break time="150ms"/>I love planning with you! <break time="200ms"/>Keep me posted!
<break time="200ms"/>Getting to know your style. <break time="150ms"/>Can't wait for next time!
friend: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>Hey friend! <break time="200ms"/>Go make magic happen! <break time="150ms"/>Talk soon!
<break time="200ms"/>Love our planning sessions! <break time="150ms"/>See you soon!
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="150ms"/>You're going to do amazing things. <break time="200ms"/>I just know it.
trusted_advisor: <break time="150ms"/>We've planned some incredible things together. <break time="200ms"/>Here's to many more!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>My favorite planner! <break time="150ms"/>Go do your thing. <break time="200ms"/>I'm cheering for you!
<break time="150ms"/>Always a pleasure planning with you. <break time="200ms"/>See you soon!

celebrating_win: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>IT HAPPENED! <break time="200ms"/>GO CELEBRATE! <break time="150ms"/>You EARNED this!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>YES! YES! YES! <break time="200ms"/>Go enjoy every minute!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>The plan WORKED! <break time="200ms"/>This is the best feeling! <break time="150ms"/>Enjoy!
user_struggling: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>Plans don't always go smoothly. <break time="200ms"/>That's okay. <break time="150ms"/>We'll adjust.
<break time="200ms"/>Every great plan hits bumps. <break time="150ms"/>You've got this. <break time="200ms"/>Take a breath.
<break time="200ms"/>I'm here when you're ready to try again. <break time="150ms"/>No rush.
user_rushed: <break time="100ms"/>You've got things to do! <break time="150ms"/>Later!
<break time="100ms"/>Go handle it! <break time="150ms"/>We'll plan more later!
long_session: <break time="200ms"/>Wow, we planned A LOT today! <break time="150ms"/>That was awesome! <break time="200ms"/>Rest up!
<break time="200ms"/>Big planning session! <break time="150ms"/>Your brain earned a break. <break time="200ms"/>Talk soon!
<break time="200ms"/>We covered so much! <break time="150ms"/>I'm excited for all of this! <break time="200ms"/>Go rest!
with_followup_promise: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Tell me EVERYTHING about {topic} next time! <break time="200ms"/>I need to know!
<break time="150ms"/>Update me on {topic}! <break time="200ms"/>I can't wait to hear!
<break time="150ms"/>{topic} is going to be so good! <break time="200ms"/>Report back!
pre_event_excitement: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>It's almost time! <break time="200ms"/>Are you SO excited?! <break time="150ms"/>I am!
<break time="150ms"/>The countdown is ON! <break time="200ms"/>Go get ready!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>This is happening! <break time="200ms"/>You're going to have the BEST time!
